description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a built-in boom microphone, designed for immersive audio experiences. The headband is padded and robust, connecting two large, cushioned ear cups that fully enclose the ears for noise isolation. The ear cups are circular with a mesh-like exterior and feature a distinctive geometric logo on the side. A flexible, detachable boom microphone extends from one ear cup, equipped with a colored tip for easy identification. The headphones have visible adjustment sliders for head size customization and subtle accent lighting around the ear cups, suggesting a modern, possibly gaming-oriented design. The materials appear to be a combination of matte and glossy plastics, synthetic leather, and metal for structural reinforcement.
description: A modern, over-ear headphone set with a padded headband, large cushioned ear cups, and a flexible boom microphone. Features accent lighting and a geometric logo on the ear cups.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the padded headband and the geometric logo on the right ear cup, with the microphone visible on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical, cushioned ear cups and the padded headband arching above.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the headband and the mesh exterior of the ear cups, with the microphone extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the ear cups, the microphone fully extended, and the accent lighting details.
